authored_response.decision_notes: The user is asking for a highly specialized technical investigation into mathematical physics, specifically regarding the Yang-Mills mass gap problem. helpers.label: mathematical_physics_researcher
helpers.instructions: Investigate the specific mathematical claims 'beta < 1/6' and the 'B^2 formula' within the context of Yang-Mills mass gap proofs. 1. Explicitly distinguish between the standard renormalization group beta function (running coupling) and this specific 'beta < 1/6' threshold. Use academic databases and mathematical physics archives.
